notes: v337 — FIXED THE APP FREEZING / RUNNING EXTREMELY SLOW ON A BIG MARKET. With the full ASX (~2,862 shares) loaded, the app was locking up and crawling. Two causes, both fixed: (1) The background job that tops up each share's saved history with today's price (and re-reads its technicals) was doing the WHOLE market in one go — about a ten-second frozen screen at a time, and it runs on every open and at the start of every scan, so the freeze kept coming back. It now runs in small background slices, pausing to let the screen breathe, so it never freezes. (2) Drawing the results table was laying out up to a thousand detailed rows at once, which is heavy; the default view now shows the top 300 (the 🔍 “Show all” link still lists every match when you want it), so the table paints fast. Together these take the worst freeze from around 20 seconds down to about one. Nothing about your data, scores or watchlists changed — the app just stays responsive. If it still feels heavy, make sure you're not on “Show all” with thousands of rows, and hard-refresh once to load v337. ALSO RECENT — v336 — the 📋 Signal report card now has a 🖨 Save / print button (a clean, dated one-page PDF of the card and the 🪜 ladder), plus a new training lesson on reading the card & the ladder. ALSO RECENT — v335 — scans (🏆 Top 20, 🕵️ Smart Money, ⚡ Gap and the rest) no longer freeze or fail to open on phones. ALSO RECENT — v334 — opening 💼 Portfolio no longer trips the browser's “page has become unresponsive” warning on phones. (Older notes live in the Owner's Manual changelog.)
